mapper.sql: SELECT rlr.limit_rule_id, rlr.limit_rule_dimension, rlr.limit_rule_target_id, CASE WHEN rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '1' THEN t.prompt_name -- 1-模板 WHEN rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '2' THEN s.scene_name -- 2-场景 WHEN rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '3' THEN g.group_name -- 3-分组 WHEN rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '4' THEN m.model_name -- 4-模型 ELSE NULL END AS limit_rule_target_name, rlr.limit_rule_type, rlr.flow_control_mode, rlr.flow_control_effect, rlr.flow_rule_type, rlr.flow_threshold, rlr.circuit_strategy, rlr.circuit_threshold, rlr.circuit_grade, rlr.circuit_window, rlr.circuit_timeout, rlr.limit_rule_status, rlr.limit_rule_remark, rlr.user_id, rlr.create_by, rlr.create_time, rlr.update_by, rlr.update_time, rlr.del_flag FROM fx67ll_ai_request_limit_rule rlr LEFT JOIN fx67ll_ai_prompt_template t ON rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '1' AND rlr.limit_rule_target_id = t.prompt_id LEFT JOIN fx67ll_ai_prompt_scene s ON rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '2' AND rlr.limit_rule_target_id = s.scene_id LEFT JOIN fx67ll_ai_prompt_group g ON rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '3' AND rlr.limit_rule_target_id = g.group_id LEFT JOIN fx67ll_ai_prompt_model m ON rlr.limit_rule_dimension = '4' AND rlr.limit_rule_target_id = m.model_id
mapper.insert:
insert into fx67ll_ai_request_limit_rule
limit_rule_dimension, limit_rule_target_id, limit_rule_type, flow_control_mode, flow_control_effect, flow_rule_type, flow_threshold, circuit_strategy, circuit_threshold, circuit_grade, circuit_window, circuit_timeout, limit_rule_status, limit_rule_remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag, user_id,
#{limitRuleDimension}, #{limitRuleTargetId}, #{limitRuleType}, #{flowControlMode}, #{flowControlEffect}, #{flowRuleType}, #{flowThreshold}, #{circuitStrategy}, #{circuitThreshold}, #{circuitGrade}, #{circuitWindow}, #{circuitTimeout}, #{limitRuleStatus}, #{limitRuleRemark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{userId},
mapper.update:
update fx67ll_ai_request_limit_rule
limit_rule_dimension = #{limitRuleDimension},
limit_rule_target_id = #{limitRuleTargetId}, limit_rule_type = #{limitRuleType}, flow_control_mode = #{flowControlMode}, flow_control_effect = #{flowControlEffect}, flow_rule_type = #{flowRuleType}, flow_threshold = #{flowThreshold}, circuit_strategy = #{circuitStrategy}, circuit_threshold = #{circuitThreshold}, circuit_grade = #{circuitGrade}, circuit_window = #{circuitWindow}, circuit_timeout = #{circuitTimeout}, limit_rule_status = #{limitRuleStatus}, limit_rule_remark = #{limitRuleRemark}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, user_id = #{userId},
where limit_rule_id = #{limitRuleId}
mapper.delete:
delete from fx67ll_ai_request_limit_rule where limit_rule_id in
#{limitRuleId}
